paywall.title: Your roster is ready.
paywall.subtitle: Unlock it for less than a coffee.
paywall.socialProof: Trusted by underground miners, FIFO operators, and rotating roster workers.

testimonials.quote: Booked flights around my swing months ahead without calling HR once.
testimonials.author: Sarah K., Underground miner — 12h rotating shifts

testimonials.quote: Showed my wife my whole site roster in under a minute.
testimonials.author: Dave L., Drill operator — FIFO roster

testimonials.quote: No more texting the supervisor to figure out if I'm on days or nights next week.
testimonials.author: Jason M., Haul truck operator — 7/7 FIFO

features.fullYear: See your full year — every shift, month by month
features.askRoster: Ask Ellie anything — "When's my next day off?"
features.aiPowered: AI that knows YOUR exact pattern, not a generic one
features.fullYearFIFO: See your full year — every work block, every R&R
features.fullYearRotating: See your full year — every phase, month by month

paywall.lossAversion: Without Pro, you're back to counting shifts on your hands.
paywall.lossAversion_fifo: Without Pro, your swing dates go back to being a mystery. Next R&R — unknown. Book the wrong week, lose the flights.
paywall.lossAversion_rotating: Without Pro, your roster goes dark. No early warning, no planning ahead. Back to guessing the noticeboard.
paywall.lossAversion_family: Without Pro, your family goes back to not knowing when you're home.
paywall.valueFrame: Less than a coffee per week to know your full year.
paywall.valueFrameMonthly: The cost of one coffee a month to know your full roster.
paywall.valueFrameWeekly: Try the full experience for {{price}}. Cancel any time.
paywall.security: Secure payment via {{platform}} · Processed by {{platform}}, not Ellie
paywall.noCard: No credit card required · Cancel anytime
paywall.subtitle_fifo: Your FIFO cycle is mapped. See every swing, every day off, for your full year.
paywall.subtitle_rotating: Your rotating roster is mapped. See every shift for your full year.
paywall.billingDisclosure: Your 7-day free trial ends {{date}}. Cancel anytime in Settings before then to avoid charges. Subscriptions renew automatically.
paywall.billingDisclosureWeekly: Billed {{price}}/week, every week. Cancel anytime in Settings.
